mission: Produce the authoritative external dependency inventory, assurance obligations, truth ladder, simulator strategy, and future provisioning backlog for Vecells without provisioning any external service yet.

touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Authenticate or step up the patient before writable portal or recovery actions continue.
touchpoints.required_proof: SessionEstablishmentDecision plus current Session and IdentityBinding tuple.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Expired auth, stale subject binding, or claim_pending means read-only or recovery-only posture, not writable success.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Secure-link continuation or bounded recovery without pretending the user is already claimed.

touchpoints.lineage_area: Receipt, more-info, callback expectation, route repair, and continuity prompts
touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Deliver secure links, receipts, more-info prompts, callback notices, repair prompts, and controlled patient notifications.
touchpoints.required_proof: AdapterDispatchAttempt and AdapterReceiptCheckpoint bound to the current grant, route intent, and visibility tuple.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Transport accepted is not delivery truth; bounced, disputed, or expired sends remain explicit repair posture.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Same-shell degraded receipt, controlled resend, or support repair; no silent reminder drift.
touchpoints.source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#Command and adapter effect ledger; callback-and-clinician-messaging-loop.md#Delivery, callback-window, and settlement confidence model

touchpoints.lineage_area: Phone intake, telephony callback, and urgent live handling
touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Capture call ingress, callback attempts, voicemail, and live urgent handling.
touchpoints.required_proof: CallbackAttemptRecord or telephony ingress record linked to AdapterReceiptCheckpoint and outcome evidence.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Duplicate dial outcomes, missing route evidence, or provider failure stay in reconcile_required or repair posture.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Callback retry, manual review, secure-link continuation, or urgent manual escalation.
touchpoints.source_refs: phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#Telephony continuation and evidence readiness; callback-and-clinician-messaging-loop.md#Callback domain

touchpoints.lineage_area: Evidence capture, upload quarantine, and audio/transcript handling
touchpoints.dependency_name: Binary artifact storage and malware / readiness processing
touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Persist uploads or recordings, scan, transcribe, and classify readiness before promotion or review.
touchpoints.required_proof: Artifact quarantine outcome, transcript readiness, and evidence-readiness record tied to the capture bundle.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Unsafe, unsupported, unreadable, or missing artifacts cannot silently disappear or pretend to be usable.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: FallbackReviewCase with degraded receipt and manual review.
touchpoints.source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#Artifact quarantine and fallback review; phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#Telephony transcript readiness

touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Deliver clinician messages, reminders, and thread-linked outbound communication.
touchpoints.required_proof: MessageDeliveryEvidenceBundle accepted through AdapterReceiptCheckpoint for the current MessageDispatchEnvelope.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Provider acceptance without delivery evidence stays pending, disputed, failed, or expired rather than delivered.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Controlled resend, support repair, callback escalation, or contact-route repair.
touchpoints.source_refs: callback-and-clinician-messaging-loop.md#Clinician message domain; phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#Reminder and communication publication

touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Search supply, hold or select capacity, commit booking, confirm provider truth, and manage appointment mutations.
touchpoints.required_proof: BookingConfirmationTruthProjection with durable provider proof or same-commit read-after-write, plus any current ExternalConfirmationGate resolution.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Async supplier acceptance, disputed callbacks, and reconciliation_required must stay explicit and block booked reassurance.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Waitlist continuation, callback fallback, hub transfer, or recovery-required posture.

touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Validate, re-check, and commit cross-site appointments once hub coordination selects a candidate.
touchpoints.required_proof: HubOfferToConfirmationTruthProjection current truth tuple plus authoritative commit / confirmation evidence.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Pending_confirmation, disputed, expired offer tuples, or imported confirmation mismatch stay visible and block closeability.

touchpoints.lineage_area: Hub practice visibility and acknowledgement debt
touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Send and evidence continuity messages or acknowledgement requests back to the origin practice for hub bookings.
touchpoints.required_proof: Current-generation PracticeAcknowledgementRecord with matching ackGeneration and truthTupleHash.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Transport acceptance alone cannot clear practice acknowledgement debt; failed, disputed, expired, or stale-generation acks remain open.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Recovery_required visibility posture, overdue acknowledgement timers, or operational escalation without calm close.

touchpoints.lineage_area: Pharmacy provider discovery and patient choice
touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Find eligible pharmacies, opening posture, capability, and safe provider choice set.
touchpoints.required_proof: PharmacyDirectorySnapshot, provider capability snapshots, and current PharmacyChoiceProof.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Stale capability, unsafe timing, or hidden-provider drift forces warning, suppression, or same-shell regeneration instead of fake choice certainty.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Fresh same-shell directory regeneration or clinician fallback when no safe provider remains.
touchpoints.source_refs: phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#Pharmacy contract, case model, and state machine; product_scope_matrix.json#cap_pharmacy_referral_dispatch_and_outcome_loop

touchpoints.lineage_area: Pharmacy referral dispatch and proof chain
touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Dispatch frozen referral packages through approved transport and observe transport or provider proof.
touchpoints.required_proof: PharmacyDispatchAttempt.authoritativeProofRef under the active TransportAssuranceProfile and ExternalConfirmationGate.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Transport accepted or provider accepted is not enough unless the current assurance profile says that proof class is sufficient.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Same-shell proof-pending posture, redispatch only under fresh tuple, or controlled reconciliation review.
touchpoints.source_refs: phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#Pharmacy contract, case model, and state machine; phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#Pharmacy dispatch and confirmation gate algorithm

touchpoints.dependency_name: Structured pharmacy outcome ingest or agreed local return channel
touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Ingest consultation summary, bounce-back, urgent return, or no-contact outcomes back into governed GP workflow.
touchpoints.required_proof: PharmacyOutcomeRecord or PharmacyBounceBackRecord correlated to the current PharmacyCase and outcome matching tuple.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Weakly matched or unmatched outcomes stay in outcome_reconciliation_pending and cannot auto-close the request.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Controlled reconciliation review, urgent bounce-back, no-contact return handling, or reachability repair.
touchpoints.source_refs: phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#Pharmacy contract, case model, and state machine; forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 79 - weak-source matching did not clearly stop at a case-local review state

touchpoints.interaction_purpose: Reuse the same patient shell in an NHS App-style embedded context under manifest-pinned, bridge-negotiated controls.
touchpoints.required_proof: PatientEmbeddedSessionProjection plus manifest tuple and release posture.
touchpoints.ambiguity_mode: Embedded drift, bridge mismatch, or frozen channel posture must degrade to read-only or handoff, not silent continued writes.
touchpoints.degraded_fallback: Safe browser handoff or bounded recovery inside the same patient shell.
